channel.title: Invests on Geeky Investor
channel.description: Recent content in Invests on Geeky Investor

item.title: My Investing strategy
item.description: In 2022, my investment total just broke $300K and I have invested for more than 6 years. Current value is $317754 and total investment is $216903. According to my calculation, my annual return rate is 11.61%. which is not bad. For now, I have spend my capital to buy a lot of stocks and some ETFs. If you have a look at my portfolio, many people might think I have too many dividend stocks.
